channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: us
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: us

item.title: Megan Thee Stallion seeks restraining order, says imprisoned Tory Lanez continues to harass her
item.description: Megan Thee Stallion asked a court on Tuesday to issue a restraining order against Tory Lanez, who she says is harassing her from prison through surrogates as he serves a 10-year sentence for shooting her in the feet.
item.dc:creator: ANDREW DALTON, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Ontario's premier says Trump's tariffs would be a disaster for US markets
item.description: TORONTO (AP) — The premier of Canada's most populous province said Tuesday President-elect Donald Trump's plan to impose sweeping 25% tariffs on all Canadian products would be a "disaster" that would hurt U.S. stock markets.
item.dc:creator: ROB GILLIES, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Indiana shrouds executions in secrecy, defying long tradition of public oversight
item.description: Executions have historically been carried out with at least some public scrutiny, from public hangings in the town square to lethal injections in prisons witnessed by journalists.
item.dc:creator: Rebecca Boone, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: This Colorado restaurant only has 2 items on the menu
item.description: A Michelin-starred chef co-opened a restaurant in Denver with only two items on the menu: a burger and fries.
item.dc:creator: Maddie Rhodes, KREX 5

item.title: US to pay nearly $116M to settle lawsuits over rampant sexual abuse at California women's prison
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — The U.S. government will pay nearly $116 million to resolve lawsuits brought by more than 100 women who say they were abused or mistreated at a now-shuttered federal prison in California that was known as the “rape club” because of rampant staff-on-inmate sexual misconduct.
item.dc:creator: MICHAEL R. SISAK and MICHAEL BALSAMO, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: New York to cap classroom temperatures next school year
item.description: New York schools have to follow a new law protecting students and staff from the heat starting September 1
item.dc:creator: Johan Sheridan, NewsNation

item.title: Tom Cruise awarded highest Navy honor for a civilian
item.description: The 62-year-old actor was celebrated for his outstanding contributions to the Navy and the Marine Corps.
item.dc:creator: Christine Samra, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Brazilian Santa swaps sleigh for Jet Ski to deliver toys — and joy — to disabled children in Rio
item.description: RIO DE JANEIRO (AP) — Santa Claus is coming to town on a Jet Ski. Dozens of children with disability gathered on Rio de Janeiro's Copacabana beach on Tuesday to receive presents — and joy — from the white-bearded man himself, a joint effort by the city's firefighters and nonprofit associations.
item.dc:creator: LUCAS DUMPHREYS, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Mystery drone sightings continue in New Jersey and across the US. Here's what we know
item.description: TRENTON, N.J. (AP) — A large number of mysterious drones have been reported flying over New Jersey and across the eastern U.S., sparking speculation and concern over where they came from and why. New Jersey Gov. Phil Murphy and U.S. Sen.
item.dc:creator: MIKE CATALINI, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Tech consultant found guilty of second-degree murder in stabbing death of Cash App founder Bob Lee
item.description: SAN FRANCISCO (AP) — A San Francisco jury on Tuesday found a tech consultant guilty of second-degree murder in the stabbing death of Cash App founder Bob Lee, which carries a sentence of 16 years to life, rejecting the defendant's claim that he had acted in self defense.
item.dc:creator: JANIE HAR, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Tax brackets and more are changing in 2024, 2025: What to know
item.description: We're more than 100 days out from Tax Day, but there are some impending updates you may want to prepare for.
item.dc:creator: Addy Bink, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Trump sues Des Moines Register, pollster for 'election interference' after pre-election poll
item.description: President-elect Donald Trump sued the Des Moines Register and its pollster for “brazen election interference” in publishing a survey the weekend before the election that showed Democrat Kamala Harris with a surprising lead of three percentage points in the state. The Register's parent Gannett Co.
item.dc:creator: DAVID BAUDER, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Family of slain Cash App founder Bob Lee reacts to Nima Momeni verdict
item.description: On Tuesday morning, a San Francisco jury announced it had found Nima Momeni guilty of second degree murder in the death of Cash App founder Bob Lee.
item.dc:creator: Jordan Baker, WGN 9

item.title: US border facilities for migrant children are improving but still need work, court monitor says
item.description: McALLEN, Texas (AP) — The U.S. still separates some migrant children from parents while holding them after they cross the border despite broad improvements at detention centers in Texas, according to a court-ordered monitor's final report.
item.dc:creator: VALERIE GONZALEZ, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: NBA unveils new All-Star format featuring four-team tournament
item.description: The NBA 's All-Star Game is going to be an All-Star tournament this season, with the league announcing on Tuesday that it has finalized plans to use a different format for the upcoming midseason showcase in San Francisco.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Death penalty sought against suspects tied to Mahogany Jackson murder case
item.description: “The facts of this case are deplorable and sickening,” Former BPD Chief Scott Thurmond said at the time. “Saddest of all, they were made public by the suspects’ decision to videotape portions of this horrific act.
item.dc:creator: Drew Taylor, NewsNation

item.title: College hockey player sued by opponent over injury she suffered on the ice
item.description: A Michigan State University hockey player has been sued by a former opponent for injuries she suffered on the ice.
item.dc:creator: Matt Jaworowski, Fox 5

item.title: Judge allows testing of tissue from George Floyd as officer convicted of killing him seeks new trial
item.description: MINNEAPOLIS (AP) — A judge has granted permission to lawyers for Derek Chauvin to have samples from George Floyd examined as part of the former Minneapolis police officer's efforts to challenge his conviction on a federal civil rights charge stemming from Floyd's death in 2020. U.S.
item.dc:creator: STEVE KARNOWSKI, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Trump seeks to smooth over concerns over RFK Jr
item.description: “I think he’s going to be much less radical than you would think,” Trump said during a wide-ranging news conference at Mar-a-Lago.
item.dc:creator: Nathaniel Weixel, NewsNation

item.title: FTC bans junk ticket, hotel fees
item.description: The final rule will become effective 120 days after its publication in the Federal Register, coinciding with the first few months of Trump’s administration.
item.dc:creator: Ashleigh Fields, KRON4

item.title: Freedom Caucus reelects Andy Harris as chair
item.description: Rep. Andy Harris (R-Md.) will chair the House Freedom Caucus through the end of 2025, members of the group decided Monday night, cementing his leadership of the hard-line conservative caucus.
item.dc:creator: Emily Brooks, NewsNation

item.title: House bill would ban 'unnecessary' genital surgeries for intersex foster youth
item.description: States receiving federal funding for foster care and adoption assistance programs would be required to prohibit certain surgeries for foster children born with intersex traits under legislation introduced Monday by Rep. Sylvia Garcia (D-Texas).
item.dc:creator: Brooke Migdon, NewsNation

item.title: Hannah Kobayashi returns to US after Mexico disappearance, had no idea about global media coverage: report
item.description: Hawaii woman Hannah Kobayashi, who was reported missing in November, has returned to the United States after she was seen crossing the U.S. border into Mexico weeks ago.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: An Alabama woman is doing well after the latest experimental pig kidney transplant
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — An Alabama woman is recovering well after a pig kidney transplant last month that freed her from eight years of dialysis, the latest effort to save human lives with animal organs.
item.dc:creator: LAURAN NEERGAARD, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: ICE removes notorious drug cartel leader from US
item.description: Osiel Cárdenas Guillén, a notorious Mexican drug lord, was removed from the U.S. and handed over to authorities in Mexico, ICE said on Monday.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Suspect in Gilgo Beach serial killings is charged in the death of a seventh woman
item.description: The New York architect facing murder charges in a string of deaths known as the Gilgo Beach killings was charged on Tuesday in the death of a seventh woman.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press via Nexstar Media Wire, Fox 5

item.title: Trump sues Des Moines Register, pollster
item.description: “Selzer’s polling ‘miss’ was not an astonishing coincidence — it was intentional,” the complaint states.
item.dc:creator: Zach Schonfeld, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Younger Asian Americans navigate something new to their generation: Taking up space
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — The chairs stay occupied at 12 Pell. Client after client, they come through the tiny barbershop on a narrow side street in Manhattan’s Chinatown. They come for the cuts, sure. But really, they’re coming for the cool.
item.dc:creator: DEEPTI HAJELA, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: House bill would ban 'unnecessary' genital surgeries for intersex foster youth
item.description: States receiving federal funding for foster care and adoption assistance programs would be required to prohibit certain surgeries for foster children born with intersex traits under legislation introduced Monday by Rep. Sylvia Garcia (D-Texas).
item.dc:creator: Brooke Migdon, Fox 5

item.title: Biden establishes a national monument for Frances Perkins, the 1st female Cabinet secretary
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — President Joe Biden on Monday established a national monument honoring the late FDR-era Labor Secretary Frances Perkins, the first woman to serve in a presidential Cabinet and a driving force behind Franklin D. Roosevelt's New Deal programs after the Great Depression.
item.dc:creator: CHRIS MEGERIAN, AAMER MADHANI and DARLENE SUPERVILLE, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Popeye and Tintin enter the public domain in 2025 along with novels from Faulkner and Hemingway
item.description: Popeye can punch without permission and Tintin can roam freely starting in 2025. The two classic comic characters who first appeared in 1929 are among the intellectual properties becoming public domain in the United States on Jan. 1.
item.dc:creator: ANDREW DALTON, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Jill Jacobson, actress who appeared on 'Star Trek' and 'Falcon Crest,' dies at 70
item.description: "We are incredibly sad to say goodbye to our beautiful, soulful, hysterically funny, elegantly raunchy client, Jill Jacobson," her manager Ben Padua told Nexstar.
item.dc:creator: Christine Samra, Fox 5

item.title: Miami WR DuBose taken off the field on a stretcher after hit to the head against Texans
item.description: Miami receiver Grant DuBose was hospitalized in stable condition and undergoing further evaluation after being taken off the field on a stretcher following a helmet-to-helmet hit against the Houston Texans on Sunday.
item.dc:creator: KRISTIE RIEKEN, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Southampton fires Russell Martin after 5-0 rout by Spurs on a bad day for Premier League managers
item.description: Southampton fired manager Russell Martin late Sunday after the Premier League's last-placed team was thrashed 5-0 by Tottenham.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Texas company says baby poop and fungi could be the solution to plastic waste
item.description: A dirty diaper may be gross to you, but one Texas company believes it could be the secret ingredient to helping answer an environmental question: How do we clean up all of our plastic waste?
item.dc:creator: Eric Henrikson, WGN 9

item.title: Holiday shopping scams to avoid this winter
item.description: Waiting on a plethora of present-related notifications? Don't assume all emails and texts you get are legitimate.
item.dc:creator: Anna Kutz, Fox 5

item.title: The original lyrics of 'Have Yourself a Merry Little Christmas' were extremely depressing
item.description: “Have Yourself a Merry Little Christmas” is already more melancholy than most classic Christmas songs, but its earlier version was a downright downer.
item.dc:creator: Michael Bartiromo, Fox 5
